task_completion.description: Verify the supplier 'Coopérative Agricole du Poitou' is entered or selected for the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Coopérative Agricole du Poitou' (or at least 'Poitou') in the supplier/vendor field of the purchase invoice form or the final saved invoice.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice reference number is set to 'INV-2024-0587'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'INV-2024-0587' in the reference, document number, or invoice number field.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice date is set to March 15, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '2024-03-15', '15/03/2024', or 'March 15, 2024' in the date field of the invoice.

task_completion.description: Verify the first line item is a Seed/Grain product with 500 units at €0.35 per unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item row containing a Seed or Grain product, a quantity of 500, and a unit price of 0.35. The line total should be 175.

task_completion.description: Verify the second line item is a Fertilizer product with 2000 units at €0.42 per unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item row containing a Fertilizer product, a quantity of 2000, and a unit price of 0.42. The line total should be 840.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice is successfully created/saved and displays the correct total amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message, a view of the saved invoice (not in edit mode), and a total amount of €1,015 (or a value between 900.0 and 1150.0).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Ekylibre graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Ekylibre web application, not a terminal executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look like a functional web application with standard navigation menus, buttons, and form layouts, not a plain text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the final result was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final invoice screen should render naturally without misaligned text, floating text boxes, or visible browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to modify the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Supplier: 'Coopérative Agricole du Poitou' (look for 'Poitou'). Reference: 'INV-2024-0587'. Date: '2024-03-15' (March 15, 2024). Line items: Exactly 2 items. Item 1: Seed/Grain, 500 units at €0.35 (Total €175). Item 2: Fertilizer, 2000 units at €0.42 (Total €840). Expected total invoice amount is €1,015 (acceptable range: €900.0 - €1150.0).
